title: festuca ovina var. borealis
intro: Festuca ovina var. borealis, also known as arctic fescue, is a type of grass native to the arctic regions of North America and Eurasia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Festuca ovina var. borealis include its antiseptic and antibacterial properties, which can help prevent infections and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, from coughs and colds to digestive problems.
